patterns.title: Privileged CI workflow executes untrusted PR code
hunt_signals: pull_request_target or other privileged trigger
checkout of fork or pull-request head
package install or lifecycle script execution
secrets, write token, publish token, signing key, or release path in same trust zone
escalation_evidence: untrusted code execution in privileged workflow
safe proof signal without real secret exfiltration
downstream build, release, package, app, or product impact

patterns.title: Shell command injection through build or deploy options
hunt_signals: command arguments joined into a string
bash -c, sh -c, cmd /c, exec, execSync, or shell-enabled spawn
bundler, compiler, deploy, IaC, codegen, or package options controlled by project input
escalation_evidence: normal developer or CI workflow executes the command
attacker can provide the project/package/config input
observable benign command result and direct remediation path

patterns.title: Server-side fetch validates URL but not resolved IP
hunt_signals: link preview, webhook, import-from-url, screenshot, avatar, or metadata fetcher
validation before DNS resolution only
redirects or attacker-controlled DNS accepted
internal, loopback, metadata, or private network target reachable
escalation_evidence: response reflection or blind callback proof

patterns.title: Crawler or browser automation trusts attacker-controlled page metadata
hunt_signals: browser-powered crawler or importer handles file inputs
page-controlled filename, accept value, path, URL, or MIME metadata
local temp, workspace, startup, plugin, config, or project path write
escalation_evidence: local file write in user-writable path
normal product usage triggers the write
later trust or execution path explained with proof

patterns.title: OIDC or identity flow accepts unverified identity token
hunt_signals: JWT parsed before signature verification
missing issuer, audience, nonce, expiry, algorithm, or key binding check
account linking trusts user-controlled identity claims
escalation_evidence: auth bypass or impersonation shown safely
affected flow and claim trust path identified

patterns.title: Low-privileged endpoint exposes blind SQL injection
hunt_signals: parameter reaches database query without safe binding
timing, boolean, error, or content side channel
low-privileged account can access endpoint
escalation_evidence: database read/write or sensitive data impact
